concerns.text: FR-028 states 'enable a new user to execute the audit on a sample corpus of 30 URLs within 30 minutes'. The Quickstart guide section does not explicitly state this 30-minute time constraint. It should be added for clarity.
FR-026 mentions Monte Carlo validation with '10 000 replicates'. The spec does not explicitly state this number. It should be added to the spec for consistency.
FR-025 states 'N ≥ 300'. The spec does not explicitly state this number. It should be added to the spec for consistency.
FR-031 states 'precision ≥ 90% and recall ≥ 80%'. The spec does not explicitly state these values. It should be added to the spec for consistency.
FR-032 states 'for any subgroup containing ≥ 10 summaries'. The spec does not explicitly state this number. It should be added to the spec for consistency.
FR-009 states 'limit memory consumption to ≤ 2 GB'. The spec does not explicitly state this number. It should be added to the spec for consistency.
